fields.label: Attribute
fields.description: The PIM Attribute to include in this template

fields.label: Is Required
fields.description: If checked, this attribute must have a value when using the template

fields.label: Sort Order
fields.description: Order in which the attribute appears (lower numbers first)

fields.label: Default Value
fields.description: Default value for this attribute when using the template

fields.label: Is Variant Axis
fields.description: If checked, this attribute will be used for variant generation

fields.label: Is Inherited
fields.description: If checked, variants will inherit this value from the master product

fields.label: Attribute Group
fields.description: Group this attribute belongs to for display purposes
